testcase.name: setup

failure.message:
Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command '/home/wadmin/Android/Sdk/platform-tools/adb -P 5037 -s b87adca4e724 install -r --no-incremental /home/wadmin/.appium/node_modules/appium-uiautomator2-driver/node_modules/appium-uiautomator2-server/apks/appium-uiautomator2-server-debug-androidTest.apk' exited with code 1'; Command output: adb: failed to install /home/wadmin/.appium/node_modules/appium-uiautomator2-driver/node_modules/appium-uiautomator2-server/apks/appium-uiautomator2-server-debug-androidTest.apk: Failure [INSTALL_FAILED_USER_RESTRICTED: Install canceled by user]
